content_fingerprint: hugging face gives every gradio space a machine readable agent api by default hugging face now auto generates an agents md endpoint for every gradio space letting coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and interact with spaces without manual configuration hugging face has quietly made a meaningful change to how its gradio spaces platform works for ai agents starting this month every space on the platform automatically serves an agents md endpoint a structured machine readable api description that ai agents can parse to understand what the space does what inputs it accepts and how
